zh.Snape Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾石內卜 霍爾
zh.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, , England: 英國坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Dawney於1515年出生在英國越可爾約克時，她的父親Sir John Dawnay20歲，母親Dorothy Neville19歲。她於大約1533年與Sir George Conyers結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其享年42歲。

zh-hans.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, , England: 英国坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Dawney于1515年出生在英国越可爾約克时，她的父亲Sir John Dawnay20岁，母亲Dorothy Neville19岁。她于大约1533年与Sir George Conyers结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dawney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dawnay
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from one of the many places in northern France named from an alder grove (Old French aulnai, aulnoi, latinized as alnetum), such as Annay (Pas-de-Calais), Aulnay (Aube, Marne, Calvados), Aulnois (Aisne), and Aunay (Calvados, Eure-et-Loire, Seine-et-Oise). With fused preposition, Anglo-Norman French d'Aunai became Dawnay, Dawney and (with loss of the final syllable) Dawn. Laney is another form of this surname with fused definite article. See also Dando , from Anglo-Norman French d'Aunou, with which d'Aunai may sometimes have been confused.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Dawney was born in 1515, in York, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Dawnay, was 20 and her mother, Dorothy Neville, was 19. She married Sir George Conyers about 1533. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1557, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Dawney est née en 1515, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dawnay, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Neville, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Conyers environ 1533. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Dawney 1515 in York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Dawnay 20 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Neville 19. Sie hat um 1533 Sir George Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Dawney è nata il nel 1515 nel York, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Dawnay, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Neville, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Conyers circa 1533. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Dawneyが1515年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父Sir John Dawnayは20歳，母Dorothy Nevilleは19歳であった。約1533年にSir George Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Dawney(이)가 1515년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dawnay(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Neville(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1533년 Sir George Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Dawney nasceu em 1515, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dawnay, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Neville, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Conyers aproximadamente 1533. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1557, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Dawney родилась в 1515 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Dawnay было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Neville, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Conyers около 1533 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Dawney nació en 1515, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dawnay, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Dorothy Neville, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir George Conyers aproximadamente 1533. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1557, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
